description: You are a GIS Security Administrator at a municipal IT department. Configure role-based access control for the GeoServer instance at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (admin / Admin123!). Create a user named 'gis_reader' with password 'GisR3ader2024!' and assign them to a new role named 'ROLE_GIS_READER'. Configure data security to grant 'ROLE_GIS_READER' read access to all layers in the 'ne' workspace using the resource pattern 'ne.*.r', and establish a service security rule allowing the role access to the WMS service.
